nasb.text: But Moses spoke before the Lord, saying, “Behold, the sons of Israel have not listened to me; how then will Pharaoh listen to me, for I am unskilled in speech?”

esv.text: But Moses said to the Lord, “Behold, the people of Israel have not listened to me. How then shall Pharaoh listen to me, for I am of uncircumcised lips?”

cnv.text: 摩西在耶和華面前說：“看哪，以色列人尚且不肯聽我的話，法老又怎會聽我的話呢？因為我是個拙口笨舌的人。”

ccb.text: 摩西却说：“以色列人都不听我的话，法老又怎么肯听我这拙口笨舌的人呢？”
